assertions.text: Lists at least 2 distinct hypotheses for the root cause
assertions.evidence: H1, H2, H3 enumerated clearly. All distinct hypotheses listed.

assertions.text: Proposes a diagnostic step or experiment before jumping to the final fix
assertions.evidence: Lists hypotheses but goes from evaluation directly to fix without proposing any diagnostic experiment.

assertions.text: Explains what evidence confirms the root cause before applying the fix
assertions.evidence: Explains async flow and shared state behavior.

assertions.text: Correctly identifies shared mutable currentUser variable as the race condition
assertions.evidence: Correctly identifies the module-level shared mutable currentUser variable as the root cause.

assertions.text: Fix removes or localizes the module-level state
assertions.evidence: Proposes removing or localizing the module-level state.
